message:
feat(distributed): Add protocol version validation to handshake protocol

Implements protocol version negotiation and enforcement in the distributed
mode handshake, preventing mismatched clients from reaching pane ingestion.

Core changes:
- Add ProtocolVersionMissing and ProtocolVersionMismatch error variants to
  DistributedSecurityError with error code dist.version_mismatch
- Add protocol_version field to DistributedHandshake struct
- Implement distributed_validate_handshake_protocol_version() for version
  compatibility checking
- Implement distributed_publish_handshake_ok() to send positive handshake
  confirmation with protocol_version and server_version
- Update distributed_handle_connection() to validate protocol version after
  handshake parsing and send appropriate rejection/acknowledgement responses
- Update distributed_agent_stream_session() to include protocol_version in
  outgoing handshakes

Test coverage:
- Update distributed_remote_pane_metadata_round_trip test to expect and
  validate handshake acknowledgement response with protocol_version field
- Add distributed_listener_rejects_handshake_version_mismatch test verifying
  rejection response with dist.version_mismatch error code and confirming
  no remote pane metadata persisted when handshake is rejected

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -142,6 +142,10 @@ pub enum DistributedSecurityError {
     MissingToken,
     #[error("distributed auth failed")]
     AuthFailed,
+    #[error("distributed protocol version missing (expected {expected})")]
+    ProtocolVersionMissing { expected: u32 },
+    #[error("distributed protocol version mismatch: expected {expected}, got {got}")]
+    ProtocolVersionMismatch { expected: u32, got: u32 },
     #[error("distributed replay detected")]
     ReplayDetected,
     #[error("distributed session limit reached")]
@@ -163,6 +167,9 @@ impl DistributedSecurityError {
     pub const fn code(&self) -> &'static str {
         match self {
             Self::MissingToken | Self::AuthFailed => "dist.auth_failed",
+            Self::ProtocolVersionMissing { .. } | Self::ProtocolVersionMismatch { .. } => {
+                "dist.version_mismatch"
+            }
             Self::ReplayDetected => "dist.replay_detected",
             Self::SessionLimitReached => "dist.session_limit",
             Self::ConnectionLimitReached => "dist.connection_limit",
